raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Assemblymember Al Muratsuchi will introduce legislation to protect seniors during the COVID-19 pandemic.",
    "The legislation will prohibit licensed senior residential care facilities from terminating, transferring, or significantly altering the conditions of residential care services during the COVID-19 state of emergency period.",
    "The bill requires that significant changes to residential care services cannot occur unless the facility owner declares bankruptcy.",
    "Changes such as termination of services or transfer of residents to other facilities require resident consent.",
    "The bill mandates that conditions of sale from a not-for-profit entity to a for-profit entity approved by the California Attorney General must remain in effect during the state of emergency.",
    "The facility owner must give at least 6-months advance notice of any proposed termination of the licensed operation to each resident.",
    "The proposal by Pacifica Companies to convert the Sakura Gardens Intermediate Care Facility into apartments has raised concerns about resident welfare during the pandemic.",
    "Conditions approved by the California Attorney General require ICF residential care services at Sakura Gardens to use the Japanese language and cultural amenities for a specified period."
  ]
}
```
